extortion.description: Centre Concrete has been a leader in the production and delivery of ready-mix concrete in central Pennsylvania since 1956, operating seven production sites. They offer a wide range of concrete products and services, including ready-mix concrete, roller-finished concrete, and decorative concrete, for residential and commercial customers. Their focus on quality, innovation, and sustainability ensures durable and energy-efficient solutions for construction needs. Through a strong commitment to customer service, Centre Concrete lays the foundation for a wide range of construction projects while contributing to environmentally responsible practices.
